title: About us – Duke Kunshan Center for Teaching and Learning
text:
About us
We improve students’ learning by helping instructors advance their teaching.
Overseen by the Dean of Academic Strategy and Learning Innovation (ASLI), the Center for Teaching and Learning (CTL) /昆山杜克大学教师教学发展中心 is an academic office that brings innovative, evidence-based teaching practices and learning opportunities to all Duke Kunshan’s faculty.
Mission: Promote Duke Kunshan faculty's teaching excellence
We guide and support all faculty as they challenge students to shape individual pathways and deepen their intellectual engagement over time, become rooted global citizens who make a difference both in professional and civic life.
We foster communications, innovations and interdisciplinary collaborations among faculty, teaching staff and teaching assistants.
We uphold openness — both in sharing what we know and what we do, and in helping faculty share their knowledge, teaching practices and passion with others.
What we do
We consult on, provide training about, and support faculty in advancing their knowledge and skills in Pedagogy, Scholarship of Teaching and Learning (SoTL), and Educational Technology via various programs and opportunities.
The team
The CTL has evolved to a team with five full-time staff, one intern, and three undergraduate student partners. They are from various academic and teaching/learning backgrounds, dedicated to supporting and growing with all faculty.
Haiyan ZhouDirectorhaiyan.zhou@duke.edu
Hanbing Lin, Ph.D.Senior Educational Consultant II for Scienceshanbing.lin@dukekunshan.edu.cn
Mengyu MaEducational Consultant IIImengyu.ma@dukekunshan.edu.cn
Fan (Luisa) LiEducational Technology Analyst IIIfan.li355@dukekunshan.edu.cn
Xiaoyu WangIntern
Sofia Martinez Gallardo QuijanoClass of 2026
Bikalpa PanthiClass of 2027
Ke NingClass of 2028
Emaan AsadClass of 2028
Achievements
Established in 2018, the CTL has earned recognition from the university as well as national and international organizations and conferences for its impactful programs and contributions by its members.
Provincial or National Awards
Institutional Recognition
Outreach and connections
The CTL actively builds partnerships and exchanges with leading institutions in mainland China, Hong Kong, and the globe. Through campus visits, joint events, and ongoing dialogue, we’ve established meaningful connections with universities such as Wuhan University, Shanghai Jiao Tong University, NYU Shanghai, Xi’an Jiao Tong-Liverpool University, etc. These collaborations enrich our work and foster shared innovation in teaching and learning.
中心还是高校教学发展网络(CHED)理事会成员、高校教师发展中心可持续发展联盟成员单位。
